indications.text:
1.1 Newly Diagnosed Glioblastoma Multiforme
TEMODARiI (temozolomide) is indicated for the treatment of adult patients with newly diagnosed glioblastoma multiforme concomitantly with
radiotherapy and then as maintenance treatment.
